risk_rationale: The Internet Transactions Act introduces new regulatory requirements for e-commerce activities in the Philippines, which may require adjustments to TikTok's existing e-commerce and consumer protection policies to ensure compliance.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Return policy minimum: 7-day no-questions-asked (14 in EU)
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: New legislation may require a different return policy duration or conditions specific to the Philippines.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential misalignment with local return policy requirements under the new act.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Dispute resolution: In-app arbitration + local ODR compliance
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: The act may introduce specific dispute resolution mechanisms that differ from current practices.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential need to align dispute resolution mechanisms with new local requirements.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Price transparency: All-in pricing including duties/taxes
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: The act may impose additional transparency requirements for pricing and fees.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential need to enhance price transparency features to comply with new regulations.

remediations.title: Review and Update Return Policy for PH Market
remediations.description: Conduct a detailed review of the new Internet Transactions Act to determine specific return policy requirements and update TikTok's return policy for the Philippines accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: Updated return policy aligns with local legislation

remediations.title: Enhance Dispute Resolution Mechanisms
remediations.description: Evaluate the dispute resolution requirements under the new act and implement necessary changes to TikTok's in-app arbitration and ODR processes for the PH market.
acceptance_criteria: Dispute resolution process meets local legal standards
User feedback indicates satisfaction with resolution process

remediations.title: Improve Price Transparency Features
remediations.description: Ensure that all pricing information, including duties and taxes, is clearly displayed to users in the Philippines in compliance with the new act.
acceptance_criteria: All-in pricing is displayed in compliance with local laws
User interface updates are user-friendly and clear

business_impact: The new legislation may require moderate adjustments to TikTok's e-commerce operations in the Philippines, potentially impacting user experience and operational processes.
recommended_actions: Conduct a legal review of the Internet Transactions Act to identify specific compliance requirements.
Coordinate with the local e-commerce team to implement necessary policy and feature updates.
Monitor regulatory developments and user feedback to ensure ongoing compliance and satisfaction.
